meta.title: For Clubs | PADEL2GO – Padel without investment for your club
meta.description: PADEL2GO brings the court, the tech, the marketing, and the community — you only bring the space. No capex, with revenue share.

hero.title: Padel is booming – but the build-out is complex.
hero.description: We bring the court, the tech, the marketing, and the community — you only bring the space and the approval.
hero.highlight: Your club incurs no costs – ever.

steps.title: How padel comes to
steps.intro: In 6 steps from the first conversation to the first match

items.title: On-site meeting
items.desc: Site check with space analysis and drone aerial — we assess which surfaces are suitable for padel courts.

items.title: Permits & approval
items.desc: We handle planning and support the building permit — including all technical documents and authority communication.

items.title: Court setup & installation
items.desc: Professional installation of mobile padel courts on your space — turnkey and ready to play.

items.title: Digital setup
items.desc: App integration, booking system, AI cameras, and lighting — the court is fully digitized.

items.title: Opening & first matches
items.desc: Grand opening with event, marketing support, and the first booked matches by your members.

items.title: Ongoing operations
items.desc: Maintenance, seasonal management, and technical support — we take care of it, you collect revenue share.

clubs.title: Where we're
clubs.intro: These clubs are bringing padel to their members — with PADEL2GO as their partner.

items.title: Court setup & maintenance
items.description: We deliver, install, and maintain the premium courts on your space. You don't have to worry about a thing.

items.title: Digital operations
items.description: Booking system, payment processing, AI camera analysis — the entire court operation runs on our platform.

items.title: Marketing & community
items.description: Events, tournaments, social media, and local marketing — we bring players to your courts.

courts.title: Premium Courts from

features.title: Exterior
features.description: Professional steel construction — representative for your club and instantly eye-catching.

features.title: Court lighting
features.description: LED floodlights for evening and night play. Maximum playing time, even in winter.

features.title: Surface
features.description: High-quality artificial turf with optimal cushioning — plays like a pro court.

features.title: Drainage
features.description: Integrated drainage system for fast water runoff — ready to play right after heavy rain.

curiosity.intro: Revenue share, member rates, timeline: the details are individual — and good for your club. Get to know us.
curiosity.footnote: No pitch, no pressure — just an open conversation via WhatsApp.

whatsapp.title: Write to us –
whatsapp.intro: Instead of forms or waiting queues: send us a short message via WhatsApp. We'll get back to you personally and arrange a meeting that fits — fast and non-binding.
whatsapp.message: Hi PADEL2GO team, we're interested in padel courts for our club and would like to arrange a non-binding consultation.
